title: Full 4-bug lifecycle fix: mount + assign_new + handle_params + temporary_assigns
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/ultimate_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.UltimateLive). A LiveView that previously had four interacting lifecycle bugs: (a) queries in mount (duplicated per reconnect), (b) assign_new misused for :items which should be freshly computed every reconnect, (c) URL params read in mount instead of handle_params, (d) temporary_assigns: [items: []] with the template trying to Enum.count(@items). Produce a cleaned version that: (1) mount only sets up defaults + scope + stream(:items, []), (2) handle_params reads %{"filter" => filter} and loads items, (3) assign the count separately from the stream (because streams are not enumerable), (4) use stream(:items, ..., reset: true), (5) no temporary_assigns, (6) no assign_new for :items.
tier_rationale: Four interacting lifecycle bugs requiring comprehensive understanding of the LV lifecycle + streams.
